---
title: "ASL Bloom Survey Data"
subtitle: "This dataset is from a set of surveys administered to caregivers of deaf children, who were recruited through the [ASL Bloom app](https://www.aslbloom.com/)."
description: |
  Data were collected and made available by [Dr. Erin Campbell](https://erinecampbell.com) at the [Boston University Deaf Center](https://deafcenter.bu.edu/). The dataset contains data from 166 caregivers.
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](images/deaf_center_rainbow_girl.png)

![](images/bloom_signing.png)
:::

{{< include _load-data.qmd >}}

{{< include _plot-prep.qmd >}}

{{< include _scatter_hist.qmd >}}

<!-- {{< include _scatter.qmd >}} -->

<!-- {{< include _hist.qmd >}} -->
